title: C-1: PRELUDE book-scale — HSWM vs dense vs clique-reduction ablation (first book-scale measurement)

lakatos_prereg.novel_cross_metric: macroF1(HSWM) - macroF1(clique_reduction) > 0pp (hypergraph-native beats its own pairwise clique expansion)
lakatos_prereg.power_note: n=262 pooled over 4 books is the primary unit (prereg); CI ~ +/-6pt on macro-F1 — if the observed delta CI straddles the +3.0pp threshold the verdict MUST be labeled low_power.

benchmark.name: PRELUDE (arXiv 2508.09848), public split
benchmark.evidence_annotations: ABSENT in public split — evidence recall@k NOT computable; explicitly out of scope for C-1

arms.dense: bge-m3 cosine top-20 over 500-token-ish chunks (no structural walk). This is the PRELUDE-paper RAG retrieval shape (paper: 500-tok chunk, top-40, ~20k tok) adapted to the judge's 24576-token context (top-20, see deviation note).
arms.hswm: repo HSWM: hypergraph(nodes=salient terms, one hyperedge per chunk binding its top-8 tf.idf terms) + traversal.py star-expansion damped-restart walk (K=2, gamma=0.5, kappa=1, mu=0.4) on the SAME cosine seed W; trip-wire abstentions fall back to pointwise per query and are counted.
arms.clique: REDUCTION ABLATION: same chunks, same term extraction, same cosine seed; hypergraph reduced to pairwise chunk-chunk graph (edge weight = sum of idf over shared terms = clique expansion), same walk shape (K=2, gamma=0.5, mu=0.4) and same support-restricted z-norm combine as traversal.py.

terms.zh: jieba posseg words flagged n/nr/ns/nt/nz len>=2 (fallback: char bigrams)

judge.context_budget: top-20 chunks + prequel < ~14k tok, fits 24576 window

stats.bootstrap: paired, instance-level resample, macro-F1 recomputed per resample

deviations_from_paper_setting: top-40 -> top-20: judge context window is 24576 tok (dgx vLLM), 40x500tok would overflow; chunk size/embedding/judge-free retrieval identical in spirit.
PRELUDE paper's judge/reader is not reused; our judge is a fixed qwen3.6-27b zero-shot binary prompt, IDENTICAL for all 3 arms (arm comparison is retrieval-only by construction).

metrics.primary: macro-F1 over {consistent, contradict}, per arm, pooled n=262
metrics.not_available: evidence recall@k (no annotations in public split)

out_of_scope: learned M (bilinear) training — M=None representation-parity control
